raw_pdf.source_role: manually downloaded source PDF; body not opened by default

appendix_normalization.source_role: hand-normalized appendix formula inventory when present

implementation_cross_check.notes: Used only to identify Rep-MMB variables, shocks, parameter values, selected Taylor-rule implementation, and model(linear) form; not used as a paper-side mathematical source.

source_sniff.first_page_title: The quest for prosperity without inflation
source_sniff.notes: First 80 Markdown lines identify the expected title and author.

notes: Core policy rules, measurement equations, output-gap equation, and inflation equation are readable in MinerU Markdown.
The OCR damaged the line reporting classical-dichotomy restrictions, so those restrictions are explicitly marked needs_review.
The source PDF body was not opened for equation-level verification.

runtime_validation.notes: Dynare was intentionally not run. Current phase is private derivation extraction only.

copyright_boundary: The derivation summarizes model structure and equations. It does not copy long prose from the paper.
